ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the game in Fahrenheit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint of the player during the year */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* Number of complete games by the player */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves by the player */,
  "innings_pitched" INTEGER /* Number of innings pitched by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "batting_average_against" REAL /* Batting average against the player */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average of the player */,
  "intentional_walks" INTEGER /* Number of intentional walks by the player */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Number of wild pitches by the player */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of batters hit by the player */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Number of balks by the player */,
  "batters_faced" INTEGER /* Number of batters faced by the player */,
  "games_finished" INTEGER /* Number of games finished by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs by the player */,
  "sacrifice_hits" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits by the player */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies by the player */,
  "ground_into_double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of ground into double plays by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "caught_stealing" REAL /* Number of times the player was caught stealing */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the log belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the log belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player in the game */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player in the game */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the game */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player in the game */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* Number of complete games by the player in the game */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts by the player in the game */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves by the player in the game */,
  "innings_pitched" INTEGER /* Number of innings pitched by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the game */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs by the player in the game */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the player in the game */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player in the game */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player in the game */,
  "batting_average_against" REAL /* Batting average against the player in the game */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average of the player in the game */,
  "decisions" INTEGER /* Number of decisions by the player in the game */,
  "holds" INTEGER /* Number of holds by the player in the game */,
  "blown_saves" INTEGER /* Number of blown saves by the player in the game */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors by the player in the game */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_statistics" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint of the player during the year */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player in the season */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player in the season */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* Number of complete games by the player in the season */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts by the player in the season */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves by the player in the season */,
  "innings_pitched" INTEGER /* Number of innings pitched by the player in the season */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the season */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs by the player in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the player in the season */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player in the season */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player in the season */,
  "batting_average_against" REAL /* Batting average against the player in the season */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average of the player in the season */,
  "intentional_walks" INTEGER /* Number of intentional walks by the player in the season */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Number of wild pitches by the player in the season */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of batters hit by the player in the season */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Number of balks by the player in the season */,
  "batters_faced" INTEGER /* Number of batters faced by the player in the season */,
  "games_finished" INTEGER /* Number of games finished by the player in the season */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs by the player in the season */,
  "sacrifice_hits" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits by the player in the season */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies by the player in the season */,
  "ground_into_double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of ground into double plays by the player in the season */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player in the season */,
  "caught_stealing" REAL /* Number of times the player was caught stealing in the season */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player in the season */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player in the season */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging of the player in the season */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins above replacement of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_star_games" (
  "all_star_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each all-star game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the game belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("all_star_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "injurydescription" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the team belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the player played for the team */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint of the player during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the position belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player at the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
